name: Meatball Stew with Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 10 ½ oz Cream of Celery Soup,
recipeInstructions:
1. See Recipe 12.
2. Use the condensed soup undiluted.
3. Use 1 can of peas, cut green beans, or sliced carrots.
4. Prepare the basic meatball recipe, except cook them in a Dutch oven. Drain off the excess fat.
5. Add the soup, sour cream, vegetables (with liquid), and potatoes to the pot. Heat to boiling, stirring occasionally.
6. Prepare the dumplings by mixing all the ingredients together until a soft dough forms.
7. Drop the dough by tablespoons onto the boiling stew.
8. Simmer uncovered for about 10 minutes.
9. Cover and simmer another 10 minutes longer.
10. Serve.
